architecture.summary: Psy-LLM combines pre-trained large language models with domain-specific data (professional Q&A pairs from psychologists and crawled psychological articles) to generate responses to psychological consultation questions. The system functions as a front-end assistant for healthcare professionals, producing immediate responses and mindfulness activities, and as a screening tool for urgent cases. Information flows from the LLM-generated text output to human evaluators and clinical end-users.

biblio.title: Supporting the Demand on Mental Health Services with AI-Based Conversational Large Language Models (LLMs)

claims.statement: The Psy-LLM framework combines pre-trained LLMs with real-world professional questions-and-answers from psychologists and extensively crawled psychological articles
The framework serves as a front-end tool for healthcare professionals, allowing them to provide immediate responses and mindfulness activities to alleviate patient stress
The framework functions as a screening tool to identify urgent cases requiring further assistance

The results demonstrate the effectiveness of the Psy-LLM framework in generating coherent and relevant answers to psychological questions evaluated using perplexity and human assessments of response helpfulness, fluency, relevance, and logic
The article discusses the potential and limitations of using large language models to enhance mental health support through AI technologies
